overall.description: First-person driving footage through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night in heavy rain. The scene features vibrant neon-lit streets, towering digital billboards, and wet reflective asphalt as the vehicle navigates through urban intersections, covered underpasses, and highway ramps. This is gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 with a distinctive magenta-cyan neon aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial downtown street with digital billboards

events.description: vehicle accelerates from stop and turns right at intersection
passes through pedestrian crosswalk with green traffic light

agents.ego_description: navigating through neon-lit city streets, accelerating and turning at intersections while observing traffic signals

notable_agents.action: oncoming car with headlights approaching from opposite direction

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying pink neon advertisements on building facade
tall cyberpunk building covered in cyan and pink neon lighting
rain-slicked black asphalt reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
futuristic car dashboard with pink holographic speedometer and navigation display
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on road surface

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives through a vibrant cyberpunk commercial district at night, surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon-lit buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the magenta and cyan lights as the car navigates intersections and passes sparse traffic.

events.description: vehicle slows down and stops at red traffic light
approaching covered underpass entrance with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising through city blocks, stopping at traffic lights and navigating around other vehicles

notable_agents.action: person in bright clothing standing near street corner

entered.detail: low-rise commercial building with prominent orange neon signage reading Fuyutsuki
contemporary building with reflective glass windows and blue accent lighting
dark tunnel entrance with overhead concrete structure becoming visible

segments.scene_description: Driving through broader city avenues with mixed commercial architecture, passing the distinctive orange-lit Fuyutsuki building. The vehicle stops at traffic lights before approaching a dark underpass entrance, with moderate vehicle traffic and occasional pedestrians visible on sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with concrete infrastructure

events.description: vehicle enters covered underpass with overhead concrete ceiling
transition from neon exterior to dim artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: navigating through the enclosed underpass, maintaining speed while surrounded by concrete walls and pillars

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure of the highway underpass with visible support beams
thick concrete columns supporting the overpass structure
linear fluorescent lighting fixtures mounted on tunnel ceiling
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the ramp edge

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered highway underpass, transitioning from the open neon-lit streets to an enclosed concrete tunnel. Artificial lighting replaces the vibrant neon, and the sound environment changes as the car drives between thick support pillars toward the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp in heavy rainfall

events.description: heavy rain becomes clearly visible on windshield as vehicle exits underpass
vehicle navigates curved ramp, reducing speed while cornering

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass onto an elevated highway ramp, navigating the curve while heavy rain obscures visibility through the windshield

entered.detail: visible rain droplets and water streaks on the vehicle's front windshield
multi-level highway infrastructure with concrete overpasses above
distant silhouette of downtown skyscrapers visible through the rain

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass onto an elevated highway ramp, the scene opens to heavy rainfall visible against the windshield. The vehicle navigates a curved ramp lined with red barriers, with the distant city skyline barely visible through the downpour and ambient neon glow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched commercial district that gradually transitions into the darker, more industrial corridors of the city. It begins by navigating vibrant intersections where towering digital billboards cast intense magenta and cyan reflections across the rain-slicked asphalt. As the vehicle moves forward, the dense commercial architecture opens into broader city avenues, passing the distinctive orange glow of the Fuyutsuki building. The scene then shifts as the car pauses at traffic lights amidst moderate traffic and scattered pedestrians before finally steering toward the looming entrance of a dark underpass.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a vehicle transitions from a confined industrial underpass into the open, rain-drenched expanse of an elevated highway. It begins by entering a covered concrete tunnel, where the vibrant city neon is replaced by artificial overhead lighting and thick support pillars. As the vehicle drives forward, the enclosed space gives way to the tunnel exit, shifting the environment back toward the ambient glow of the city. The scene then opens onto a curved highway ramp lined with red barriers, where heavy rainfall becomes visible against the windshield. Finally, the camera navigates the bend, revealing a distant skyline shrouded in a dense downpour and a magenta-cyan neon haze.
